prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次分别为8584→7467→7722→11694→7739，整体呈波动走势。2024年因新高考改革首年（物理类）出现较大位次后移至11694，2025年迅速回弹至7739，与2022-2023年水平基本持平，2025年基准位次约7739名；该校在安徽省理科组计划人数：2021年213人、2022年211人、2023年208人、2024年209人、2025年239人；2026年计划242人，较2025年增加3人，小幅扩招约1.26%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第36名，近年稳定在33–38名区间，属于国内顶尖理工类高校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第65位（评价"一般"），综合热度472008，短视频平台曝光度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程获评A-，兵器科学与技术为传统王牌，与当前高热度工科专业方向高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，南京理工大学在上述领域均有强势学科布局，对考生吸引力较强；安徽省2026年高考总报名约45.1万人，较2025年（约46.2万）略有减少，物理类考生按历史比例估算约31.3万人，竞争基数小幅下降；南京理工大学位于江苏省南京市，与安徽省相邻，南京是安徽考生跨省求学的首选城市之一，地域吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7739、2026年计划小幅扩招（+1.26%）、学校层次稳固、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配、安徽考生对南京的地域偏好等因素。考虑到学校工科实力突出、专业热度持续偏高对位次有向上拉动（位次数字减小），但扩招和考生基数略降有向下拉动（位次数字增大），综合修正后预测2026年最低位次约7827名，区间7327–8327名。

- 电子信息类（含电子科学与技术、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程）
- 自动化类（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group (including science/physics category) were 8584 → 7467 → 7722 → 11694 → 7739, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform (physics category), there was a significant drop to 11694, but it quickly rebounded to 7739 in 2025, roughly on par with the 2022-2023 levels. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7739. The planned enrollment for this university in the Anhui science group: 213 in 2021, 211 in 2022, 208 in 2023, 209 in 2024, and 239 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 242, an increase of 3 students from 2025, a slight expansion of about 1.26%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. It ranks 36th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, and has been stable in the 33-38 range in recent years, making it a top-tier science and engineering university in China. Its 2026 reputation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 65th (rated as 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity score of 472,008, indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms. There are no obvious records of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A+, while Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering received A-. Armament Science and Technology is a traditional strong point, highly aligned with current high-demand engineering fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Nanjing University of Science and Technology has strong disciplinary layouts in these areas, making it attractive to candidates. In 2026, the total number of Anhui college entrance exam registrations is about 451,000, a slight decrease from about 462,000 in 2025. The number of physics category candidates is estimated at about 313,000 based on historical proportions, so the competition base has slightly decreased. Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, adjacent to Anhui. Nanjing is one of the preferred cities for Anhui candidates seeking cross-province education, giving it strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7739, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1.26%), the stable school level, the strong alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors, and the regional preference of Anhui candidates for Nanjing. Given the university's strong engineering strength and the sustained high popularity of majors, which tends to push rankings upward (smaller ranking numbers), while the expansion and slight decrease in candidate base push rankings downward (larger ranking numbers), the comprehensive adjusted prediction for the 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 7827, with a range of 7327 to 8327.

- Electronic Information (including Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Engineering)
- Mathematics (including Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics)
- Detection, Guidance and Control Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Materials Chemistry)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Physics, Nanomaterials and Technology)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Engineering, Bioengineering)
- Business Administration (including Accounting, Human Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7327 to 8327, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety choice. Nanjing University of Science and Technology has outstanding engineering strength, so it is advisable to prioritize popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation, which are highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) were 2562 → 2448 → 3240 → 3130 → 3157, showing a fluctuating and then shifting trend in recent years. After the ranking shifted to 3240 in 2023, it stabilized in the 3130–3157 range in 2024–2025, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3157 in 2025. The planned enrollment for this university in Anhui Province's liberal arts group: 28 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 31 in 2025; planned enrollment of 25 in 2026, a decrease of 6 compared to 2025, a reduction of about 19.35%, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 36th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, with a stable level; neutral/mixed reputation evaluation in 2026; average popularity on Douyin, no major negative public opinion; no record of enrollment gaps; NJUST has few liberal arts majors, mainly involving law (not separately rated in discipline evaluation), linguistics, etc. The university is strong in engineering, and liberal arts are not its advantage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high but polarized social popularity; foreign language majors have average popularity and are wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Anhui Province is estimated at about 138,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (141,400). Nanjing has strong appeal to Anhui examinees, but NJUST's small liberal arts enrollment and limited major choices may affect some examinees' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3157, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-19.35%), the university's weak liberal arts advantage, and the slight decrease in the number of liberal arts examinees, considering the large reduction but average popularity of liberal arts majors, the adjusted predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2840, with a range of 2414–3266.
